title: taraxacum infidulum
intro: Taraxacum infidulum, also known as the lesser dandelion or narrow-leaved dandelion, is a perennial plant species within the dandelion genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum infidulum include supporting liver function, reducing blood pressure, and providing antioxidant properties, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. Taraxacum infidulum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be consumed raw or cooked as a vegetable, although the plant's bitter taste may require it to be blended with other ingredients.
